news.headline: US Energy Department: No requests have yet been made to Congress on money for filling the Strategic Petroleum Reserve.
Gravette Capital-backed Cheddies Crackers expands nationwide with Target rollout, offering organic cheese crackers with real cheddar cheese sourced sustainably.
news.summary: Gravette Capital announces its support for Cheddies, a snack brand gaining recognition for its organic cheese crackers, crafted with authentic cheddar cheese sourced sustainably. This endeavor comes amidst rising popularity for snacks with genuine ingredients. Made headlines on March 7, 2025, Gravette Capital's partnership highlights a significant step towards promoting sustainable sourcing within the snack industry.

news.headline: Mark Templeton, AV industry veteran, joins Blue Square X as Director of Engineering, bringing over a decade of experience.
news.summary: In Hollywood, Florida on March 7, 2025, Blue Square X shared the news of Mark Templeton joining them as the new Director of Engineering. Templeton has over ten years of experience in the AV industry, having worked with various integration and consulting firms in the past.

news.headline: United Airlines will install Starlink on 40 regional aircraft monthly through 2025, boosting Wi-Fi speed by 50x.
news.summary: United Airlines Holdings, Inc. recently shared its plan to equip its first regional aircraft with Starlink, emphasizing the technical advantages this equipment offers. The company unveiled that they are set to install Starlink on over 40 regional aircraft per month starting from May throughout 2025. The installation process usually lasts approximately eight hours, not accounting for any removal of pre-existing equipment, testing, or necessary aircraft modifications. This move signifies a significant investment in enhancing the technological capabilities of their fleet.

news.headline: Cardano's price dropped 4.27% to $0.88 in 24 hours after a 41.0% gain over a week.
news.summary: In the last day, the price of Cardano (CRYPTO: ADA) dropped by 4.27% to $0.88, showing a reversal from its positive performance in the past week, during which it surged by 41.0% from $0.62. The latest data illustrates the fluctuation and volatility of Cardano's price over the recent 24-hour period. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: AI in Media Market to reach USD 82.45 Billion by 2032, growing at 25.8% CAGR: Verified Market Research®.
news.summary: Verified Market Research® has recently launched a new research report titled "AI in Media Market: Global Industry Trends, Share, Size, Growth, Opportunity, and Forecast for the period 2025-2032." This comprehensive report provides a detailed analysis of the significant impact of artificial intelligence on the media industry. It covers the global market trends and offers insights into the expected growth opportunities.

news.headline: Global Smart Meter Market expected to grow from $26.36B in 2024 to $46.14B by 2030, with 9.8% CAGR.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, it is projected that the worldwide Smart Meter Market will increase from approximately USD 26.36 billion in 2024 to USD 46.14 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 9.8% expected during the forecast period. The adoption of electric, gas, and water smart meters has revolutionized the way in which...

news.headline: Changes in Elenger Polska Sp. z o.o. with Vaiko Tammeväli's removal from Supervisory Board and Paweł Szaniewski's appointment to Management Board. Supervisory Board to continue with five members, Management Board with three.
news.summary: The Supervisory Board of Elenger Polska Sp. z o.o., a subsidiary of Aktsiaselts Infortar, saw a recent change in membership as of 07.03.2025. Vaiko Tammeväli was removed based on a resolution by the sole shareholder. The board will now consist of five members. Paweł Szaniewski was appointed as a new Management Board member resulting in a total of three members on the Management Board. Details of the prior experience of Vaiko Tammeväli and Paweł Szaniewski, along with their shareholding in Infortar, are included in the attached notice.

news.headline: Lamb Weston will release Q3 earnings on April 3, 2025; conference call at 10am ET. Webcast available.
news.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LW) is set to announce its fiscal 2025 third-quarter earnings on April 3, 2025. The official news release will be distributed prior to market opening, with a conference call scheduled for 10:00 a.m. ET. Interested parties can tune into the webcast and related documents on the Lamb Weston Investor Relations webpage at https://investors.lambweston.com/events-and-presentations. For those in the U.S. and Canada looking to join the call, dial 888-XXXXXXX.

news.headline: Ecommerce startup Platter raises $1.6M in funding, launches Platter+ app to optimize checkout.
news.summary: A tech startup called Platter based in New York has successfully secured $1.6 million in a preliminary funding round. The objective behind this financial boost is to empower brands with efficient ecommerce tools, allowing them to manage their online stores more effectively without depending on specialized solutions for essential functionalities. The investment round was spearheaded by Animal Capital and saw contributions from Visionary Ventures, along with notable figures in the ecommerce industry like Ben Jabbawy, Kyle Hency, Aaron Spivak, Pierson Krass, and additional investors. Platter plans to utilize this fresh injection of funds to integrate various disparate tools into a more cohesive platform.

news.headline: DeFi's decentralization compromised by rising compliance, threatening censorship and user autonomy.
news.summary: The concept of decentralized finance (DeFi) is facing challenges due to rising compliance requirements, which could result in censorship and diminished user autonomy. This trend is eroding the essence of DeFi, which aims to provide financial services without the need for intermediaries. The growing regulatory burden is imposing restrictions and control measures that contradict the fundamental principles of DeFi. This shift towards regulation threatens to stifle innovation and limit the potential for truly decentralized financial systems. In addition, the escalating compliance costs are hindering the growth of DeFi projects and could potentially drive users away from these platforms. This issue highlights the ongoing struggle between regulatory compliance and the core values of decentralization within the DeFi space, raising concerns about the future direction of the industry.

news.headline: Custom Truck One Source displayed Load King Turbo Loader at WWETT 2025, Booth #4843. Leading provider of specialty equipment to infrastructure markets.
news.summary: In Kansas City, Missouri, Custom Truck One Source, Inc. (NYSE: CTOS), a top supplier of specialty equipment for various sectors including electric utility and telecom, made a notable impact at the WWETT Show 2025, the leading global gathering for wastewater and environmental service experts. At Booth #4843, visitors experienced the latest innovations in vacuum trucks, particularly the unveiling of the Load King Turbo Loa. The event showcased cutting-edge technology and solutions for industry professionals.

news.headline: Markel promotes Nan Fine to Managing Director, Casualty, Southeast Region and appoints Hillary Warren as Manager.
news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia on March 7, 2025, Markel, a part of Markel Group Inc. (NYSE: MKL), revealed that Nan Fine has been elevated to the position of Managing Director of Casualty for the Southeast Region at Markel Specialty. Additionally, Hillary Warren has been named as the Manager for a specific area within the company.

news.headline: ColorComm's 10th Annual Conference to gather 600 executive leaders at Fontainebleau Miami Beach on July 23-25, 2025.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, ColorComm, Inc., a prominent women's platform and business community, announced that they will host the 10th Annual ColorComm Conference at the Fontainebleau Miami Beach in Miami, Florida from July 23-25, 2025. The event is expected to bring together close to 600 executive leaders for discussions and networking opportunities.

news.headline: SFA Therapeutics reports positive Phase 1b data on SFA-002 for psoriasis with significant improvements in PASI and IGA scores.
news.summary: JENKINTOWN, Pennsylvania - On March 7, 2025, SFA Therapeutics, Inc. revealed that the participants in their study showcased noteworthy enhancements in Psoriasis Area and Severity Index (PASI) as well as Investigator Global Assessment (IGA) scores. These improvements were deemed statistically significant. SFA Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm focusing on innovative oral drugs.

news.headline: MSI introduces two new quartz colors: Calacatta Azulean™ and Calacatta Cinela™, expanding the Bocage Collection.
news.summary: In Orange, California on March 7, 2025, M S International, Inc. (MSI), a top provider of flooring, countertops, wall tile, and hardscaping products in North America, has unveiled two stunning new additions to their collection. The company is excited to present Calacatta Azulean™ and Calacatta Cinela™ as part of the Q™ Premium line. These new products are set to enhance the already diverse range offered by MSI, showcasing the company's commitment to innovation and quality.

news.headline: Bluetooth technology enables iOS users to spoof location in Pokémon GO using FonesGo Changer.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, a new tool called FonesGo Location Changer was introduced to assist Pokémon GO enthusiasts in effortlessly navigating various terrains. This GPS spoofing application is compatible with both iOS and Android platforms, offering users advanced functionalities such as Multi-Modes and Bluetooth-enabled location alterations.

news.headline: Xthings partners with AWS IoT for ULTRALOQ Smart Locks integration, aims to improve smart home connectivity.
news.summary: Xthings, a prominent provider of IoT solutions, has unveiled a new integration feature using AWS IoT Device Management that aims to streamline device onboarding and control for smart home service providers. This integration is expected to simplify processes for smart home service providers by utilizing managed integrations. The announcement was made in Fremont, California on March 7th, 2025. This move is set to benefit a wide range of users and numbers regarding the impact of this initiative are anticipated to be substantial.

news.headline: Tony Lucia appointed as President of ULAC Europe BV by United Legwear & Apparel Co., LLC (ULAC) in New York.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, United Legwear & Apparel Co., LLC (ULAC), a leading New York company specializing in apparel, legwear, bodywear, and accessories, has appointed Tony Lucia as the President of ULAC Europe BV. This strategic move aims to strengthen ULAC's presence in Europe and boost growth in the region. ULAC is known for its global operations and product range. With this appointment, the company is looking to drive further expansion and capitalize on opportunities in the European market. Tony Lucia's leadership will be instrumental in guiding ULAC's European division towards achieving its objectives.

news.headline: Inventor from East Orange, N.J. creates Drawer Extension (NJR-141) to prevent items from falling out ($$$$).
news.summary: On March 7, 2025 in Pittsburgh, an inventor from East Orange, N.J., shared the creation of a new device called the DRAWER EXTENSION. This device aims to prevent items from inadvertently falling out of drawers into the main cabinet area. The inventor expressed the inspiration behind the invention, emphasizing the need for a solution to this issue. The DRAWER EXTENSION design serves the purpose of securing items within drawers effectively, possibly reducing the risk of clutter or accidents caused by items slipping into the cabinet area. This innovation reflects the inventor's dedication to practical solutions, hinting at potential improvements in drawer organization and safety.

news.headline: Hospital PMI at 56% in February 2025 marks 18th straight month of growth, following 35 months prior.
news.summary: In Tempe, Arizona on March 7, 2025, it was reported that economic activity within the hospital subsector experienced growth in February. This marked the 18th consecutive month of growth following two periods of contraction within the previous four months. Prior to these contractions, there were 35 consecutive months of growth in the sector. The report was provided by the nation's hospital supply industry.

C3is Inc. (Nasdaq: CISS) will release Q4 & full year 2024 financial results on March 11, 2025 after market opens.
news.summary: Athens, Greece - C3is Inc., a ship-owning company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol CISS, has disclosed it will unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year ending December 31, 2024, on March 11, 2025, post the New York market opening. This announcement comes as the company gears up to provide insights into its performance during the specified period to investors and analysts.

news.headline: Iran's UN mission: Iran has not yet received Trump's letter.
Solana (SOL) price may drop by 25% due to Trump’s new crypto order banning purchases of non-Bitcoin cryptos.
news.summary: The value of SOL is at risk of a significant decrease by 25% due to Donald Trump's recent executive order on cryptocurrencies. This order prohibits any new investments in cryptocurrencies other than Bitcoin.

news.headline: Report on J Sainsbury's tech activities and digital transformation strategy in 2024, offering insights into its initiatives and partnerships.
news.summary: A company profile for J Sainsbury 2024 has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The profile highlights the company's tech endeavors, such as digital transformation strategies, innovation programs, and technology initiatives. J Sainsbury, a multi-channel retailer, provides groceries, general merchandise, and apparel through retail outlets, website, and mobile app. The enterprise operates in the sup sector, targeting diverse customer segments.

news.headline: BP and Jera Co. form 50-50 JV in offshore wind with 13GW capacity across regions, launching by Q3.
news.summary: BP plc (NYSE:BP) has revealed a new 50-50 joint venture in offshore wind with Jera Co., Inc. The CEO of this venture will be Nathalie Oosterlinck, who is currently leading Jera Nex. The goal of this collaboration is to expedite development by utilizing their combined project pipelines and improving access to competitive financing. The joint venture is set to manage operating and development assets that could potentially generate a total of 13GW across Europe, Asia Pacific, and the US. Prior to its launch by the end of the third quarter, the joint venture is awaiting regulatory approvals.

Country artist Coffey Anderson releases new single "You Can't Spell Hero Without Her" to honor female veterans.
news.summary: A new patriotic anthem titled "You Can't Spell Hero Without Her" has been released by country music artist Coffey Anderson, inspired by a wounded female veteran. This song is a heartfelt tribute honoring women in the military. Released on March 7, 2025, the single aims to showcase the courage and sacrifices made by female service members. The artist hopes to raise awareness about the unique experiences of women in the military through this soulful composition.

news.headline: US Economic Advisor Hassett: We will see a bigger hit on government employment in the next reports.
Private equity group bids $24 billion for Walgreens, causing speculation and excitement.
Alchemy Pay is now recognized as a Self-Regulatory Organisation in Switzerland, boosting stablecoin payment solutions.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Singapore, the world's top fiat-crypto payment provider, Alchemy Pay, has disclosed its acceptance into the Association for Quality Assurance of Financial Services (VQF) as an acknowledged Self-Regulatory Organisation (SRO) in Switzerland.

news.headline: Trump: I would rather negotiate a deal with Iran - Fox Business Network.
Intuitive Machines lands lunar lander Athena 250m off target at southernmost point on Moon, a historic achievement.
news.summary: On March 07, 2025, Intuitive Machines, Inc. revealed that its IM-2 mission lunar lander named Athena successfully landed, coming within 250 meters of its target in the Mons Mouton region located at the lunar south pole. The landing occurred within a crater, marking it as the most southern lunar landing and surface operations ever accomplished. Intuitive Machines, identified on Nasdaq as LUNR and LUNRW, is a prominent company specializing in space exploration, infrastructure, and services.

news.headline: Medical Solutions in Omaha, NE celebrates female leadership for International Women's Day with women leading the company at the highest levels.
news.summary: In Omaha, Nebraska on March 7, 2025, as International Women's Day and Women's History Month highlight the accomplishments of women globally, Medical Solutions is recognizing the outstanding women in top leadership roles within the company. Females constitute a significant percentage...

news.headline: India's BMS market to grow at 11.6% CAGR from 2024-2030, featuring top companies like Honeywell, Schneider Electric, and more - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A recent report has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, providing insights on the India Building Management System market. The report forecasts a significant growth with the market revenue expected to increase at a CAGR of 11.6% between 2024 and 2030. The Building Management System market in India is witnessing substantial growth, highlighting the rising importance of efficient building solutions in the country.
